models.name: Vios
models.highlights: The undisputed king of Philippine roads. Renowned for cheap parts, bulletproof reliability, and excellent fuel economy.

models.name: Corolla Altis
models.highlights: From the vintage rear-wheel-drive KE70 to the modern Altis Hybrid, the Corolla is the historical daily commuter benchmark.

models.name: Innova
models.highlights: The classic Filipino family transporter. Highly valued for its rugged diesel engine, body-on-frame durability, and 7-seat capacity.

models.name: Avanza
models.highlights: A compact, highly fuel-efficient 7-seater popular with ride-sharing, small businesses, and urban families.

models.name: Wigo
models.highlights: An ultra-compact entry-level hatchback offering great maneuvering in Manila traffic and over 18 km/L fuel mileage.

models.name: Fortuner
models.highlights: The best-selling mid-size SUV in the country, appreciated for its high ground clearance and aggressive styling.

models.name: Hilux
models.highlights: A workhorse pickup truck trusted by businesses and off-roaders alike for durability and load-carrying capacity.

models.name: Mirage G4
models.highlights: Locally manufactured under the CARS program. Extremely popular for Grab drivers due to its small footprint and 3-cylinder efficiency.

models.name: Xpander
models.highlights: A stylish, high-ground-clearance family crossover-MPV that has become a best-seller for city commuting.

models.name: Lancer
models.highlights: A legendary sportier alternative to the Corolla. Legacy models remain highly popular second-hand project daily cars.

models.name: Montero Sport
models.highlights: A major Fortuner competitor. Beloved for its comfortable coil-spring rear suspension and highly responsive MIVEC diesel engine.

models.name: L300
models.highlights: The legendary commercial workhorse. Found in almost every delivery fleet and utility route across the country.

models.name: Adventure
models.highlights: A classic Asian Utility Vehicle (AUV) that transported generations of Filipino students and workers. Indestructible engine.

models.name: City
models.highlights: A premium subcompact option. Known for spirited i-VTEC engine response, smooth CVT drivability, and spacious cabin layout.

models.name: Civic
models.generations: 1972 - Present (EG, EK, ES, FD, FB, FC, FE)
models.highlights: The darling of the enthusiast daily driver. The FD generation (1.8 VTEC) and FC turbo models are highly sought after second-hand.

models.name: Brio
models.highlights: Honda's smallest offering, combining zippy handling with excellent fuel economy and premium hatchback interior feel.

models.name: CR-V
models.highlights: A comfortable, passenger-car-like SUV. Early generations are common budget family runabouts; newer models offer 7 seats.

models.name: BR-V
models.highlights: A 7-seater crossover that blends SUV high ride height with Honda's car-like driving dynamics.

models.name: Almera
models.highlights: Lauded for class-leading rear legroom and trunk space. The newer turbo generation adds modern styling and fuel gains.

models.name: Sentra
models.highlights: The B13 generation (Sentra LEC) is legendary in the Philippines as an indestructible, cheap-to-run first car for college students.

models.name: Navara
models.highlights: Famous for its coil-spring rear multi-link suspension, which offers the most comfortable, car-like ride of any pickup in PH.

models.name: Accent
models.highlights: The U2 CRDi diesel hatchback/sedan variant is legendary in the Philippines. High torque, cheap fuel costs, and massive mileage capacity.

models.name: Grand Starex
models.highlights: The default choice for executive vans, school shuttles, and large family road trips across provinces.

models.name: Tucson
models.highlights: A highly successful compact SUV offering refined styling and an efficient diesel drivetrain option.

models.name: Soluto
models.highlights: An affordable, entry-level commuter sedan equipped with modern infotainment and low running costs.

models.name: Picanto
models.highlights: A stylish, nimble city runabout perfect for daily commutes through tight barangay streets and narrow lanes.

models.name: Ranger
models.highlights: Highly popular for its bold American-truck looks, advanced tech features, and wild Ranger Raptor variants.

models.name: Everest
models.highlights: A pickup-platform SUV that competes heavily with Fortuner. Famous for advanced driver safety aids and premium cabin tech.

models.name: Coolray
models.highlights: The vehicle that spearheaded Chinese brand adoption in the PH. Known for aggressive styling, high tech features, and fast acceleration.

models.name: Okavango
models.highlights: A massive, value-packed 7-seater utilizing mild-hybrid technology to provide competitive fuel economy for its scale.
